settings.title: Settings
settings.selectRuntime: Select the runtime environment that best fits your hardware. Chris AI dynamically manages resources to ensure optimal inference speeds.

webllm.name: Web-LLM
webllm.description: Native WebGPU acceleration for high-performance neural inference directly in the browser.

transformers.name: Transformers v3 - NOT WORKING
transformers.description: Max compatibility runtime using WASM kernels. Ideal for legacy systems and diverse environments.

settings.modelsSubtitle: Library of weights compatible with your current engine.
settings.webgpuDescription: Web-LLM utilizes the emerging WebGPU API++, which allows the interface to bypass standard browser overhead and communicate directly with your device's graphics card. This results in up to 10x faster token generation compared to traditional WASM implementations.
settings.localPrivacyDescription: All data remains on your machine. Both engines execute entirely within your browser's sandbox environment, ensuring that your prompts and private model weights remain strictly local to your hardware.
settings.appSettingsDescription: Manage your application data and preferences
settings.deleteAllDataDescription: Remove all locally stored data including chat history, settings, and downloaded models. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAllDataSuccess: ✅ All data deleted successfully! The page will reload shortly...
settings.deleteModelsDescription: Remove all downloaded AI/LLM models to free up storage space. Models can be re-downloaded later.
settings.privacyDescription: Your data stays on your device. No information is sent to external servers.
settings.privacyContent: All computations are performed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted to any server. Your prompts and model weights remain strictly on your device.
settings.impressumContent: © 2026 Local LLM Chat. All rights reserved.
settings.librariesDescription: View the open-source libraries powering this application
settings.githubDescription: View the source code and contribute on GitHub

modeDescriptions.expert: Detailed explanations with details and bullet points

chatSettings.temperatureHint: Lower values = more precise, higher values = more creative answers
